name: Charging Robotics Inc.
business: Charging Robotics is engaged in the development, production and installation of wireless charging systems for electric vehicles in robotic parking systems. The company has received initial orders from three different Automatic Parking Facilities suppliers in Israel. Its current product wirelessly charges EVs in automated parking systems where cable-based charging is not feasible.
sellsTo: owners and operators of public parking spaces

exposures.sentence: The current focus of the company is wireless charging systems for electric vehicles (EVs) in robotic parking systems.
Our current product, for which we have received initial orders from 3 different Automatic Parking Facilities (APS) suppliers, is a system for wireless charging of EV in APSs.
For this we have developed a patent-pending technology to navigate to the EV using data obtained by lidar (laser-based) sensors viewing only the EV's wheels.
We will also be able to install electricity storage system for increasing this profit by purchasing electricity at low rates, storing it and selling it at peak demand times at a premium.

By investing in Revoltz, we see not just an investment in a high demand, fast growing market of small electrical vehicles we also expect a synergy to happen by providing our charging technology and integrate it as part of the infrastructure that adopts Revoltz vehicles.

catalysts.event: Installation of Parkomot wireless charging system
catalysts.sentence: The Parkomot system is expected to be installed by the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: Earn-out milestone extension agreement for Milestone Warrants
catalysts.sentence: On March 23, 2026, we entered into an earn-out milestone extension agreement with the holders of the Milestone Warrants pursuant to which the holders of the Milestone Warrants extended the deadline for achieving the Earn Out Milestones to December 31, 2026.
The March 2026 Private Placement and the issuance of the PIPE Shares and PIPE Pre-Funded Warrants is expected to close on the Uplist Date.

tamClaims.claim: Global wireless EV charging market expected to reach $568 billion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: According to recent research companies, the global wireless EV charging market is expected to reach some 568 billion U.S. dollars by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Global electric last-mile delivery market estimated at $29.17 billion in 2024, projected to reach $139.41 billion by 2033 at 19.4% CAGR.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Research and Markets, the global electric last-mile delivery market was estimated to be approximately $29.17 billion in 2024 and and is projected to reach $139.41 billion by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 19.4%, driven by rising e-commerce demand and stringent urban emission regulations.

tamClaims.claim: EV unit sales anticipated to reach 18.84 million by 2029.
tamClaims.sentence: According to updated forecast reports from Statista, the unit sales of the EV market are anticipated to reach 18.84m vehicles units by 2029.

tamClaims.claim: Revenue in Electric Vehicles market projected to reach US$828.6 billion worldwide in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2025, the revenue in the Electric Vehicles market is projected to reach a staggering US$828.6bn worldwide.
